---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: Report a problem with the action
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened.

## Workflow YAML
Paste the workflow file that triggered the bug:
```yaml
# .github/workflows/your-workflow.yml
```

## Logs
Paste relevant workflow logs or error messages:
```
Error message here
```

## Environment
- GitHub Actions runner: `ubuntu-latest` / `macos-latest` / `windows-latest`
- Action version: `@v1` / `@v1.0.2` / commit SHA
- OS of repo: (if self-hosted runner)

## Context
Any other context about the problem that might be helpful.

## Possible solution
If you have an idea how to fix it, share it here.
